name: Broccoli Frittata
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen chopped broccoli, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until tender. Do not brown.
2. Add broccoli, garlic, rice, and Parmesan; mix well.
3. Combine eggs, milk, and seasonings.
4. Stir into rice mixture.
5. Turn into a well-buttered shallow 1-quart casserole.
6. Top with mozzarella cheese.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes until set.
